rationale: Educ. Code §37.353 governs school facility safety good cause exceptions. It has no operative relationship to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 37.353. GOOD CAUSE EXCEPTION. (a) If a school district is unable to bring a district facility into compliance with a school facilities standard related to safety and security, the district may claim a good cause exception from the requirement to comply with that standard
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this school facilities safety provision.
